channel.title: releases on Drupal WxT
channel.description: Recent content in releases on Drupal WxT

item.title: Releases
item.description: Important We try our best to have security releases of Drupal Core within 24-72 hours of being made available on drupal.org. Release Created Date Description 3.0.18 2020-11-26T16:45:22Z Features/Updates: Update Drupal Core to 8.8.12 SA-core-2020-013 Upgrade path: Update your codebase: composer update Run database updates: drush cache:rebuild drush updatedb Run Lightning configuration updates:
